title: message_changes uses i64::MAX query limit causing unbounded allocation
description: In jmap.rs, both message_changes (around line 1684) and message_query_changes (around line 2111) call store.query_messages(chan, 0, i64::MAX). This fetches every message row into a Vec<MessageRow> before slicing. On a store with millions of messages, a single JMAP /Email/changes or /Email/queryChanges call from a token holder exhausts heap. Fix: apply a reasonable maximum limit (e.g. 10_000) before calling query_messages, and return the standard JMAP 'tooManyChanges' error if sinceSate is too far behind.
